tests.name: feature_build_loop_completed
tests.details: uat-feat-1: all 6 build_loop steps completed (tests_written, tests_verified_failing, implemented, security_audit, documentation_updated, feature_recorded). git commit succeeded; test-gate.sh --record-feature recorded the feature; build-progress.json features_completed=["uat-feat-1"].

tests.name: upgrade_command_exits_zero
tests.details: upgrade-project.sh --to-sponsored-poc completed: poc_mode private_poc -> sponsored_poc, files updated, audit entry appended, commit created, post-upgrade verify-install + validate ran (53 passed / 6 warnings expected for stub project).

tests.name: phase_state_preserved
tests.details: current_phase=2 preserved across upgrade; project='uat-agent-65' preserved; gates dates preserved.

tests.name: process_state_preserved
tests.details: build_loop history preserved (was reset to null after feature_recorded by design); features_completed=["uat-feat-1"] preserved in build-progress.json.

tests.name: new_required_artifacts_listed
tests.details: Upgrade output lists files updated (.claude/phase-state.json, .claude/tool-preferences.json, CLAUDE.md, PROJECT_INTAKE.md), surfaces UAT migration steps and BL-009/BL-015 helper refresh.

tests.name: pending_approval_sentinel_respected
tests.details: Wrote .claude/pending-approval.json then ran upgrade-project.sh --to-production; got '[FAIL] upgrade blocked — pending user decision' with non-zero exit (PR #17 U-F fix confirmed).

tests.name: upgrade_changelog_present_in_script
tests.details: scripts/upgrade-project.sh header lines 12,16 mention BL-006 + BL-015 changelog entries; line 162 references BL-015 sentinel respect; lines 1465-1469 reference BL-009/BL-015 helper refresh.

tests.name: no_template_placeholders_in_output
tests.details: grep of upgrade output for __PROJECT_NAME__ / __PLATFORM__ / __LANGUAGE__ / __TRACK__ returned no matches.

tests.name: u_e_poc_mode_lookup_works
tests.details: Upgrade read 'Current POC mode: private poc' from .claude/phase-state.json without falling back to intake-progress.json (PR #17 U-E fix confirmed).

tests.name: no_uncommitted_secrets
tests.details: git ls-files | grep -Ei 'password|api[_-]?key|secret|token' returned only template/CI references (.gitignore comment, ci.yml GITHUB_TOKEN secret reference, gitleaks tooling line in PROJECT_INTAKE.md). No leaked credentials.

tests.name: log_files_consistent
tests.details: N/A — no FORCE/reset events occurred; .claude/process-audit.log absent, which is expected per runbook.

tests.name: no_orphaned_tempfiles
tests.details: find .claude -name '*.tmp' returned no matches.

tests.name: no_framework_contamination
tests.details: git -C $FRAMEWORK status --short shows only pre-existing untracked entries (.claude/, Reports/uat-2026-04-26/); HEAD still d66e8f276079aa352ba90ac54386e1b1896d7494 (unchanged from setup capture).

summary: Upgrade flow private_poc -> sponsored_poc on mobile/standard succeeded end-to-end; PR #17 (U-E, U-F, U-H), PR #18 (self-guard, fake-remote tolerance), and PR #19 (--non-interactive) all confirmed working; no Critical/High bugs and no doc gaps surfaced.
